scale_snapshot.summary: June 1 advanced many HawkinsOperations proof and control surfaces while preserving separate claim ceilings.

proves: Source exists and can be reviewed.
Controlled validation boundary under scoped test conditions.
Reviewer navigation and public route rendering.
Bounded reviewer release route for HO-DET-001.
does_not_prove: Does not prove public-safe runtime proof.

what_changed: Separated 4 governed cases from 49 controlled validation fires.
Preserved 106 validation cases, 8 proof records, 31 blocked claims, and public-safe count 0.
Recorded Project Board reconciliation as REPO_BACKED_RECONCILIATION_PLAN_NO_PROJECT_MUTATION.
june_1_workstreams.public_safe_summary: Reviewer metrics show scale while keeping activity counts separate from proof claims; public-safe count 0 remains explicit.
june_1_workstreams.notes: The scale claim is that the counts were separated and bounded, not that counts became proof.

what_changed: Preserved a private candidate route with reviewer-safe summary facts.
Published a prerelease, not a stable release.
Kept public-safe count 0 and AI_DECIDED_DISPOSITION=false.
june_1_workstreams.public_safe_summary: Runtime Route Proof v1 is a private candidate preserved for reviewer routing with NOT_PUBLIC_SAFE still explicit.
june_1_workstreams.notes: The public route preserves summaries, maps, hashes, and verifier references while excluding raw private material.

what_changed: Created wording gate material for future summaries.
Created what-to-say and what-not-to-say guardrails.
Created custody/hash map and reviewer demo readiness material.
june_1_workstreams.public_safe_summary: Guardrails protect public wording after private candidate preservation; they are not public-safe runtime proof.
june_1_workstreams.notes: The guardrail work is summarized only; private packet internals are not included.

what_changed: Advanced Wazuh rule-source validation controls.
Advanced logtest/static registry validation controls.
Fixed duplicate rule and parent group parsing behavior inside source/static validation lanes.
june_1_workstreams.public_safe_summary: Wazuh CI supports source/static validation only and does not prove runtime proof or deployment proof.
june_1_workstreams.notes: Source/static validation controls remain separate from live route claims.

what_changed: Separated public PR validation from trusted manual/private proof-loop paths.
Added verifier coverage for public PR workflow runner exposure.
june_1_workstreams.public_safe_summary: Runner trust separation keeps public PR checks distinct from trusted manual/private workflows.
june_1_workstreams.notes: This is source and validation control, not public runtime evidence.

what_changed: Advanced read-only wrapper/access baseline validation for Splunk, Wazuh, and Cribl lanes.
Validated fail-closed status behavior and route-visibility preflight boundaries.
june_1_workstreams.public_safe_summary: Wrapper/access bridge work is read-only preflight and source/static control; it does not prove runtime route success.
june_1_workstreams.notes: No credential material or private tool details are included in the public packet.

what_changed: Improved organization front-door and reviewer routing surfaces.
Preserved GitHub and website rendering as reviewer navigation, not proof authority.
june_1_workstreams.public_safe_summary: Front-door work helps reviewers find proof routes while saying rendering is not proof.
blocked_claims: blocked: green CI as merge authority

what_changed: Separated historical V1 routing from current HawkinsOperations proof routing.

blocked: current runtime proof from legacy material
blocked: current public-safe proof from legacy material

Public use remains generalized and summary-level.

blocked_claims: blocked: prevented drift as proof promotion
june_1_workstreams.notes: Only generalized claim-control value is used here.

what_changed: Created a LinkedIn proof-boundary packet with Markdown, JSON, checksums, manifest, and verifier.
Added June 1 scale layer while preserving blocked claims and NOT_PUBLIC_SAFE boundaries.
june_1_workstreams.public_safe_summary: PR #78 is a public-summary-safe candidate packet and verifier route, not proof promotion.
